content: أي حِتَّة في هَازَرَع كِتير هَتِلاَقي جُوَّها أحلى كِتير
translations: eng:anywhere there are lots of plants you will find its atmosphere is much nicer

transcriptions.arabizi: 'ai hitta fee|ha zaraA kiteer hatilae'i guww|aha 'ahla kiteer
